event.name: REWRITE
event.reminderMessage: Don't forget! ICC Youth Invitation Service — Rewrite starts in 1 hour!

hero.title: Rewrite
hero.subtitle: God Can Rewrite Your Story
hero.quoteText: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.description: We are a vibrant community of young believers passionate about knowing God, finding purpose, and making a difference. Our youth ministry provides a safe, welcoming space for young people to grow spiritually, build meaningful friendships, and discover their God-given potential.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To raise a generation of young leaders who are rooted in God's Word, filled with the Holy Spirit, and equipped to impact their schools, communities, and the world for Christ.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To reach young people with the gospel, disciple them in their faith, connect them in meaningful community, and empower them for service and leadership in God's kingdom.

welcomeMessage.title: A Message For You
welcomeMessage.message: Whether you're new to faith, searching for answers, or looking to deepen your relationship with God — you are welcome here. Come as you are. Encounter God. Find your people. Rewrite your story.
welcomeMessage.author: ICC Youth Ministry

whyAttend.title: Relevant Bible-Based Messages
whyAttend.description: Experience powerful, practical teachings that speak directly to the challenges and questions young people face today — all grounded in God's Word.

whyAttend.title: Meaningful Friendships
whyAttend.description: Connect with other young believers who share your faith, values, and desire for authentic relationships that go beyond surface level.

whyAttend.title: Worship and Prayer
whyAttend.description: Encounter God's presence through heartfelt worship, prayer, and a spiritual atmosphere that transforms lives and renews minds.

whyAttend.title: Fun Activities and Events
whyAttend.description: Enjoy a lively, engaging environment with icebreakers, fellowship games, and activities designed to build connection and create lasting memories.

whyAttend.title: Personal Spiritual Growth
whyAttend.description: Take the next step in your faith journey through discipleship, mentoring, and practical tools for building a strong spiritual foundation.

songSection.heading: SONGS
songSection.description: Click to open the lyrics to sing along

watchLive.heading: WATCH
watchLive.description: Join us live as we worship and experience God's presence together.

slides.heading: SLIDES
slides.description: Follow along with the presentation slides as you listen. Use the arrows to navigate through slides.

whatsToExpect.heading: THE
whatsToExpect.description: A typical service runs approximately 2 hours with a flow designed to help you encounter God and connect with others.

items.title: Fellowship
items.description: Time to connect and catch up with one another.

items.title: Worship Songs
items.description: Lifting our voices in praise to God.

items.title: Welcome
items.description: A warm welcome to everyone joining us.

items.title: Communion & Contribution
items.description: Jesus rewrote the story of separation into a story of relationship.

items.title: Ice Breakers
items.description: Fun activities to get everyone engaged.

items.title: Lesson
items.description: The main message for the day.
items.speaker: Bro. Felix

items.title: Reflection & Announcements
items.description: Processing the message and important updates.

lyrics.text:
அலங்கார வாசலாலே
பிரவேசிக்க வந்து நிற்கிறோம்
lyrics.transliteration:
Alangaara vaasalaalae
Piravaesikka vanthu nirkirom

lyrics.text:
தெய்வ வீட்டின் நன்மையாலே,
நிரம்பிட வந்து நிற்கிறோம்
lyrics.transliteration:
Theyva veettin nanmaiyaalae,
Nirampida vanthu nirkirom

lyrics.text:
ஆராதிக்க வந்தோம், அன்புகூற வந்தோம்
யெகோவா தேவனையே,
துதித்திட வந்தோம் தொழுதிட வந்தோம்
தூயவர் இயேசுவையே
lyrics.transliteration:
Aaraathikka vanthom, anpukoora vanthom
Yekovaa thaevanaiyae,
Thuthiththida vanthom tholuthida vanthom
Thooyavar Yesuvaiyae

lyrics.text:
ஆலயம் செல்வதே,
அது மகிழ்ச்சியை தந்திடுதே..
என் சபையுடனே, உமை தொழுதிடவே
கிருபையும் கிடைத்திட்டதே
lyrics.transliteration:
Aalayam selvathae,
Athu makilchchiyai thanthiduthae..
En sabaiyudanae, umai tholuthidavae
Kirubaiyum kidaithittathae

lyrics.text:
நன்மை செய்தவர்கே – நாங்கள்
நன்றி செலுத்துவோமே,
எம்காணிக்கையை, உம் கரங்களிலே
உற்சாகமாய் விதைக்கிறோமே
lyrics.transliteration:
Nanmai seythavarkae – naangal
Nandri seluththuvomae,
Emkaanikkaiyai, um karangalilae
Ursaagamaay vithaikkiromae

lyrics.text:
துதி கணம் மகிமையுமே
முழு-மனதோடு செலுத்தினோமே,
சம்பூரண ஆசிர்வாதங்களால்
திருப்தியை அனுப்பிடுமே
lyrics.transliteration:
Thuthi kanam mahimaiyumae
Muzhu-manathodu seluththinomae,
Sampoorana aasirvaathangalaal
Thirupthiyai anuppidumae

songs.title: Lord, I Lift Your Name on High

lyrics.text:
Lord I lift Your name on high
Lord I love to sing Your praises
I'm so glad You're in my life
I'm so glad You came to save us

You came from heaven to earth to show the way
From the earth to the cross, my debt to pay
From the cross to the grave, from the grave to the sky
Lord I lift Your name on high

Lord I lift Your name on high
Lord I love to sing Your praises
I'm so glad You're in my life
I'm so glad You came to save us

You came from heaven to earth to show the way
From the earth to the cross, my debt to pay
From the cross to the grave, from the grave to the sky
Lord I lift Your name on high

You came from heaven to earth to show the way
From the earth to the cross, my debt to pay
From the cross to the grave, from the grave to the sky
Lord I lift Your na…

உங்க நாமம் உயரணும்
இன்று மேன்மை அடையனும்
பாடுவேன் பாடுவோம் அல்லேலூயா
lyrics.transliteration:
Unga naamam uyaranum
Intu maenmai ataiyanum
Paaduvaen paaduvom Alleluya

lyrics.text:
அல்லேலூயா-4
யாவே அலேல்
அல்லேலூயா-2
lyrics.transliteration:
Alleluya-4
Yaavae alael
Alleluya-2

lyrics.text:
பெருங்காற்றும் அடங்கிப்போகும்
எக்கடலும் வழிதிறக்கும்
உங்க நாமம் உயர்த்தும்போது
கன்மலையும் கரைந்து போகும்
lyrics.transliteration:
Perungaatrum adangip pogum
Ekkadalum vazhi thirakkum
Unga naamam uyarthum pothu
Kanmalaiyum karainthu pogum

lyrics.text:
இயேசுவே உம் நாமமே
உயரனும் அல்லேலூயா
இயேசுவே உம் நாமமே
பெருகனும் அல்லேலூயா-2
lyrics.transliteration:
Yesuvae um naamamae
Uyaranum Alleluya
Yesuvae um naamamae
Peruganum Alleluya-2

lyrics.text:
சிங்கத்தின் கெபியிலும்
தீச்சூலை நடுவிலும்
உங்க நாமம் உயர்த்தும் போது
சேதங்கள் அணுகிடாது
lyrics.transliteration:
Singaththin kebiyilum
Theechoolai naduvilum
Unga naamam uyarthum pothu
Saethangal anugidaathu

lyrics.text:
சிறைச்சாலை அடைப்பதில்லை
சங்கிலிகள் நிரந்தரமில்லை
உங்க நாமம் உயர்த்தும் போது
அஸ்திபாரம் நிலைப்பதில்லை
lyrics.transliteration:
Siraichaalai adaipathillai
Sangiligal nirantharamillai
Unga naamam uyarthum pothu
Asthiparam nilaippathillai

lyrics.text:
Above all powers
Above all kings
Above all nature and all created things
Above all wisdom and all the ways of man
You were here before the world began

Above all kingdoms
Above all thrones
Above all wonders the world has ever known
Above all wealth and treasures of the earth
There's no way to measure what you're worth

Crucified
Laid behind the stone
You lived to die
Rejected and alone
Like a rose trampled on the ground
You took the fall
And thought of me
Above all

நன்றி சொல்லி உம்மை பாட வந்தோம்
உம் காருண்யத்தை எண்ணி போற்ற வந்தோம்
lyrics.transliteration:
Nanti solli ummai paada vanthom
Um kaarunnyaththai enni pottra vanthom

lyrics.text:
வார்த்தையினால் நீர் சொன்னதெல்லாம்
கரங்களினால் இன்று நிறைவேற்றினீர்
lyrics.transliteration:
Vaarththaiyinaal neer sonnathellaam
Karangalinaal intu niraivaettineer

lyrics.text:
நன்றி -2 சொல்வோம் உயிர் உள்ளவரை
ஒன்றும் குறையாமல் காத்திடும் நல்லவரை
lyrics.transliteration:
Nanti -2 solvom uyir ullavarai
Ontum kuraiyaamal kaaththidum nallavarai

lyrics.text:
காற்றுமில்ல மழையுமில்ல
ஆனாலும் வாய்க்காலை நிரப்பினீரே
lyrics.transliteration:
Kaattrumilla malaiyumilla
Aanaalum vaaykkaalai nirappineerae

lyrics.text:
உடன்படிக்கை செய்து நடத்தி வந்தீர்
மாறாமல் எப்போதும் காத்துக் கொண்டீர்
lyrics.transliteration:
Udanpatikkai seythu nadaththi vanthaer
Maaraamal eppothum kaaththuk konteer

lyrics.text:
கைவிடாமல் விட்டு விலகிடாமல்
நெருங்கின பாதையிலும் கூட வந்தீர்
lyrics.transliteration:
Kaividaamal vittu vilagidaamal
Nerungina paathaiyilum kooda vanthaer

lyrics.text:
வெட்கப்பட்ட தேசத்திலே
கீர்த்தியும் புகழ்ச்சியுமாக்கினீரே
lyrics.transliteration:
Vetkappatta thaechathilae
Keerthiyum pugazhchiyumaakineerae

lyrics.text:
வழி தெரிஞ்சும் நா தொலைஞ்சிபோனேன்
பாத புரியாம பயந்து நின்னேன்
lyrics.transliteration:
Vazhi Therinjum Naa Tholanji ponen
Paadha puriyama bayandhu ninnen

lyrics.text:
நூறு பேர தேடி நீங்க போகல
தொலைந்து போன என்ன தேடிவந்திங்க
lyrics.transliteration:
Nooru perae thedi neenga pogala
Tholaindhu pona enna thedivandhinga

lyrics.text:
நீர் என்ன மறக்கல
என்ன விட்டு விலகல
ஏக்கமுள்ள கண்ணால
ஏங்கித்தான் நின்னீங்க
lyrics.transliteration:
Neer enna marakkala
Enna vittu vilagala
Ekkamulla kannaala
Engithaan ninneenga

lyrics.text:
நீர் என்ன வெறுக்கல
தள்ளி தூரம் போகல
கால்கடக்க எனக்காக
கடல் தாண்டி வந்திங்க
lyrics.transliteration:
Neer enna verukkala
Thalli thooram pogala
Kaalkadakka enakkaaga
Kadal thaandi vandhinga

lyrics.text:
சிறந்ததெல்லாம் கூட்டத்தில் இருக்க
தரமிழந்த என்னை தேடி வந்தது ஏன்
lyrics.transliteration:
Sirandhathellaam koottathil irukka
Dharamizhantha ennai thedi vandhadhu yen

lyrics.text:
என்ன தேடுவத நீங்க நிறுத்தல
உங்க அன்புக்கு ஒரு எல்லை இல்ல
lyrics.transliteration:
Enna theduvadha neenga niruthala
Unga anbukku oru ellai illa

lyrics.text:
புதியதுவக்கம் எனக்கு தந்திங்க
உங்க தோளின் மீது சுமந்து வந்திங்க
lyrics.transliteration:
Puthiyathuvakkam enakku thandhinga
Unga tholin meedhu sumandhu vandhinga

lyrics.text:
கல்லெறியும் கூட்டத்தின் முன்னே
என் ஆதரவாய் நின்றவர் நீரே
lyrics.transliteration:
Kalleriyum koottathin munnae
En aadharavaay ninravar neerae

lyrics.text:
என் கரம்பிடித்து தூக்கினீர்
என் கறைகளெல்லாம் நீக்கினீர்
lyrics.transliteration:
En karambidithu thookineer
En karaigalaellaam neekineer

lyrics.text:
உம் பிள்ளையாக மாற்றி விட்டீரே
என்னை தள்ளாத தகப்பன் நீரே
lyrics.transliteration:
Um pillaiyaaga maatri vitteerae
Ennai thallaadha thagappan neerae

speaker.name: BRO. FELIX
speaker.title: Youth Minister & Speaker
speaker.bio: Bro. Felix is a passionate youth minister dedicated to reaching the next generation with the transformative power of God's Word. With years of experience in youth ministry, he brings energy, wisdom, and a prophetic edge to every message he delivers. His heart is to see young people experience genuine life change and walk in their God-given purpose.

highlights.heading: Event Highlights

quote.text: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.
quote.author: Romans 12:2

scripture.text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.

keyTakeaways: Learn how to renew your mind according to God's Word
Discover your identity and purpose in Christ
Build lasting friendships with like-minded young believers
Experience the transforming power of worship and prayer
Leave equipped to impact your generation for Christ

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.testimony: This youth ministry changed my life. I came in broken and confused, but through the messages and the love of this community, I found my purpose in Christ.

testimonials.name: Joshua R.
testimonials.testimony: The worship here is incredible. I've never felt God's presence like this before. The friendships I've made are genuine and have helped me grow so much.

testimonials.name: Maria L.
testimonials.testimony: I was searching for meaning and found it here. The teachings are relevant to what I'm going through as a young person. This ministry feels like family.

testimonials.name: David K.
testimonials.testimony: Being part of this youth group has been the best decision I've made. The mentorship, the Bible studies, the fun activities — it's all helped shape who I am today.

faq.question: Is registration required?
faq.answer: Yes, registration is encouraged so we can prepare enough seating, materials, and refreshments for everyone. Walk-ins are welcome, but registration helps us serve you better.

faq.question: What should I bring?
faq.answer: Just bring yourself and an open heart! You may want to bring a Bible, a notebook, and a pen. We'll provide everything else including refreshments.

faq.question: Can I invite my friends?
faq.answer: Absolutely! In fact, we encourage it. This event is designed for young people, and there's nothing better than experiencing God's presence together with friends.

faq.question: Is there any registration fee?
faq.answer: No, this event is completely free. We believe the gospel is for everyone, and we never want finances to be a barrier to encountering God.

faq.question: What age group is this for?
faq.answer: Our youth ministry serves young people from high school through young adult — typically ages 13 to 30. Everyone is welcome regardless of where they are in their faith journey.

faq.question: What time should I arrive?
faq.answer: Doors open at 9:30 AM, 30 minutes before the service starts at 10:00 AM. Arriving early gives you time to check in, grab a seat, and enjoy the pre-service atmosphere.

registration.heading: Register For The Event
registration.description: Fill out the form below to secure your spot. Registration is free and helps us prepare for your coming.
registration.successMessage: Thank you for registering! We can't wait to see you at the event. Get ready for a life-changing experience!

address: Near Sathya Studio, Opp. Dr. MGR Janaki College,

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you

seo.title: ICC Youth Invitation Service — Rewrite | June 28, 2026
seo.description: Join us for a powerful youth revival encounter! ICC Youth Invitation Service with Bro. Felix. Experience worship, fellowship, and life-changing messages. Register now!
